script: set +e; echo before: $(stat -c%s /etc/claude-tokens/mskai.env); sudo cp -p /etc/claude-tokens/lia.env /etc/claude-tokens/mskai.env; echo after: $(stat -c%s /etc/claude-tokens/mskai.env); sudo systemctl restart mskai-responder.service; sleep 4; echo "mskai-responder: $(systemctl is-active mskai-responder.service)"; echo "mskai-bot: $(systemctl is-active mskai-bot.service)"
